common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this call to search item.

request_params.name: offset
request_params.description: Specifies the starting entry of data to return in the current call. Default is empty. if data is more than one page, the offset can be some entry to start next call.

request_params.name: attribute_status
request_params.description: 1:get item lack of requires attribute.   2:get item lack of optional attribute.

sku. If you search for item_sku and item_name at the same time, only the results that match item_sku will be returned. If you search for item_sku and attribute_status at the same time, the results that match both item_sku and attribute_status will be returned.
request_params.name: item_sku

request_params.description:
NORMAL/BANNED/UNLIST/REVIEWING/SELLER_DELETE/SHOPEE_DELETE

If you want to search multiple status, please upload the url like this: item_status=NORMAL&item_status=BANNED
request_params.name: item_status

request_params.description: If deboost_only is true, then API will return items whose deboost is true, if deboost_only is empty or false, then API will return items whose deboost is true and false simultaneously
request_params.name: deboost_only

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: message
response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: warning
response_params.description: Indicate waring details if hit waring. Empty if no waring happened.

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking

children.name: total_count
children.description: Total num of items match condation.

children.name: next_offset
children.description: If has_next_page is true, this value need set to next request.offset

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/product/search_item?access_token=access_token&attribute_status=2&item_name=apple&offset=0&page_size=10&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;
